sigWerErrors.reason: Omitting 'nokta' (dot) in an email address changes the structure and can make the email invalid or direct it to a different address. This is a significant error.
Omitting 'nokta' (dot) in the domain part of the email address ('email nokta com') changes the domain and makes the email address invalid. This is a significant error.
